offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late audits. We automate the extraction and formatting of vendor payment data instead of manual data entry and spreadsheet management.
problem: Manual data entry and formatting for quarterly audits is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try data extraction from invoices on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process for new users
